assertions.reason: GovernanceToken supply is non-zero, holders receive balances, undelegated voting power is zero, and self-delegation makes getVotes equal balance.
evidence: command: npx hardhat test --no-compile test/GovernorLifecycle.ts --grep "deploys governance token with correct supply and ERC20Votes|uses timestamp-based CLOCK_MODE|self-delegation activates voting power"
command: npx hardhat test --no-compile test/GovernorLifecycle.ts --grep "undelegated holder has zero voting power"
passed test: deploys governance token with correct supply and ERC20Votes
passed test: self-delegation activates voting power
passed test: undelegated holder has zero voting power

assertions.reason: An eligible delegated proposer successfully creates a proposal and the test asserts the resulting proposal state is Pending (0).

assertions.reason: Delegated voters cast For (1), Against (0), and Abstain (2), and proposalVotes() is asserted to match the expected vote-weight totals.

passed test: records for, against, and abstain votes correctly

assertions.reason: After delegated For votes from the major token holders, the proposal reaches Succeeded state (4), demonstrating quorum and majority approval in the lifecycle test.

passed test: full propose → vote → queue → execute lifecycle
